technical.lead: NVIDIA unveils NemoClaw, an enterprise-wrapped OpenClaw, at GTC 2026
technical.body: — Pitched against Hermes Agent's learning-loop emphasis, NemoClaw makes the "breadth vs depth" framing explicit. NemoClaw wraps OpenClaw with audit logging, access control, and guardrails, normalizing the larger ecosystem (346K stars, 44K skills, 50+ platforms) for enterprise adoption.

technical.lead: vLLM v0.18 / v0.19 ship in quick succession
technical.body: , adding gRPC serving, GPU-accelerated speculative decoding, and Day-1 Gemma 4 support.

technical.lead: Bonsai 1-bit LLM lands a WebGPU browser-inference demo (Apr 16)
technical.body: . `llama.cpp` `b8838` (Apr 18) adds remote-server connection and a verifiable-inference sample.

technical.lead: Claude Opus 4.7 reaches GA on Amazon Bedrock
technical.body: . In parallel, Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview (vulnerability-discovery specialized) enters Bedrock as a Gated Preview.

including — CVE-2026-33826 — (Windows AD, CVSS 8.0), — CVE-2026-32157** (RDP Client, 8.8), and **CVE-2026-33827** (Windows TCP/IP, 8.1). CIS warns that indirect prompt injection is rising sharply.******
